name: origen-ae-plugins
description: Origen AE's Claude Code plugins — multi-agent workflows and dev tooling

plugins.name: claude-agent-team
plugins.description: Scaffolds a complete multi-agent dev team: 7 agents (PM, architect, frontend, backend, QA, reviewer, librarian), an 8-stage serial workflow with human approval gates and change-size tiers (S/M/L), a shared document system (PRD/SPEC/TEST-PLAN/ADR/RUNBOOK/BACKLOG), and an auto-generated STATUS dashboard.
